title: Vindsvept Music
body:
**Vindsvept Music**

A Medieval Fantasy like music pack that plays along side minecraft music or stand alone by itself.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/8JFG_bKg5lE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

[Full Playlist Here](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLlEhI7YH7xIz1UWMyH3Fv4qpL54arzYS0)
